text.text: Take your workflow to the next level.
Check out the [full changelog](https://github.com/JannisX11/blockbench/releases/tag/v5.1.0) - or watch the [update video](https://youtu.be/OH82WjNwriE)!

features.title: Mirror Animating
features.text: With this new feature, you can just animate one side of your model, and all changes will be mirrored to the other side - in real time and with phase offset support!

features.title: Bounding Boxes
features.text: Bounding Boxes make it easier than ever to configure hitboxes and collisions for your model!

features.title: Improved Pen Tablet Support
features.text: Take your texturing to the next level with your pen tablet, pressure and tilt sensitivity included!

features.title: Image Formats
features.text: In addition to PNG, JPEG, TGA, and WebP are now natively supported as texture formats!
